parsed_review.summary: CP00-829 is a Risk C, 150-unit descriptor-only continuation pack bridging Platform Extensibility interface fixture/review/evidence rows into P04 UI rows. It does not overclaim: manifest production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false, and the descriptor-level production_ready_flag (platform_extensibility_fixture_review_ui_bridge_descriptor_verified) is supported by implementation (packages/platform/src/registry.js, validators.js), three CP00-829 tests (packages/platform/test/model.test.js), the RP27 validator (scripts/validate-rp27-platform-extensibility-contract.mjs), the Hermes H27 evidence packet (emits_runtime_receipt=false), and the committed contract artifact (contracts/platform-extensibility-contract.json: validation.valid=true, latest_pack_id CP00-829, per-row no-leak guards, no_write_attestation). Authority/safety boundaries hold: Claude is read-only (Read/Grep/Glob, read_only=true) and not final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false); Hermes is deterministic control-plane only and not embedded in product runtime; no API/webhook/workflow runtime opening, no product/permission/audit writes, no real client data or secrets; human final approval required for runtime opening (deferred to CP00-830). Pack baseline matches the live plan exactly (range RP27.P03.M06.S10-RP27.P04.M04.S11, 150 units, risk C, ledger SHA 13c7ed65). Review-hardening checks pass: auth preflight succeeded (exit 0, 1224-byte valid JSON result), artifacts are valid JSON, no forbidden tools, all required schema fields present. Unrelated dirty files (UI control-room, workbook docs) are correctly scoped out. Downstream closeout artifacts (command-evidence.json, construction-inspection.json, adjudication.md, claude-review-result.json, review-receipt.json) are not yet present — the expected pre-adjudication state, confirmed against the closed CP00-828 artifact set. One P3 informational note records that validations were inspected structurally rather than independently re-executed (reviewer is read-only, no Bash). No P0/P1/P2. Verdict: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS; does not block pack or this-CP goal closeout.

findings.title: Validation commands verified by source inspection, not independently re-executed; closeout-evidence files generated downstream
findings.details: As a read-only reviewer (Read/Grep/Glob only, no Bash), I verified the CP00-829 descriptor-only claim structurally rather than by re-running the 10 validation commands (npm test, npm run validate, npm run closeout-pack:validate, etc.). Structural verification covered: the binding/requirements/descriptor/Hermes+Claude packets/closeout handoff in packages/platform/src/registry.js; the descriptor, coverage, and contract validators in packages/platform/src/validators.js; three CP00-829 tests in packages/platform/test/model.test.js (coverage match to live plan, descriptor runtime-closed, contract projection current); the RP27 validator scripts/validate-rp27-platform-extensibility-contract.mjs; and the committed artifact contracts/platform-extensibility-contract.json (latest_pack CP00-829, latest_projection descriptor, authority_boundary, per-row no-leak flags, validation.valid=true, no_write_attestation). The closeout-evidence files referenced by manifest.required_pack_artifacts — command-evidence.json and construction-inspection.json — plus adjudication.md, claude-review-result.json, and the review-receipt.json/raw-output.json are not yet present under docs/closeout-packs/cp00-829/ (only manifest.json exists) or artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-829/. Manifest status is in_progress and pack_level_claude_review.status is pending with empty valid_review_receipts, which is the expected pre-adjudication state; the closed pack CP00-828 contains the full 5-file doc set plus raw-output.json and review-receipt.json, confirming these are produced after this Claude review.
findings.recommendation: At adjudication/closeout, ensure the harness captures command-evidence.json (all 10 validation commands passing, including git diff --check) and construction-inspection.json before flipping production_ready and committing, matching the CP00-828 artifact set. No code change required; this note documents the inspection-based verification scope.
findings.post_review_disposition: Informational only; does not block pack or goal closeout. Confirms the descriptor-only claim is supported by source inspection and that absent downstream evidence files are the expected pre-adjudication state.
